_comment: Golden conformance fixture: linear.issue.work_item.v1 — canonical decision + profile -> expected rendered payload + receipt-mapping. Offline only; no live write.

canonical_decision.title: Add rate-limit backoff to the Linear connector active fetch
canonical_decision.summary: Implement exponential backoff with jitter when the Linear GraphQL API returns 429. Scoped to the active poll path; webhook path is unaffected.
